tasks.label: mitmproxy:start
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $py='${config:python.defaultInterpreterPath}'; $ws='${workspaceFolder}'; $pidFile=Join-Path $ws '.vscode\mitmproxy.pid'; $outLog=Join-Path $ws 'proxy_out_log.txt'; $errLog=Join-Path $ws 'proxy_error_log.txt'; $addon=Join-Path $ws 'handle_cors_addon.py'; if (-not (Test-Path $addon)) { throw ('addon not found: ' + $addon) } $venvScripts=Split-Path $py; $mitmdump=Join-Path $venvScripts 'mitmdump.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $mitmdump)) { throw ('mitmdump.exe not found in: ' + $venvScripts) } if (Test-Path $pidFile) { $oldPid=(Get-Content $pidFile -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); if ($oldPid) { try { Stop-Process -Id $oldPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {} } Remove-Item $pidFile -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; } $p=Start-Process -FilePath $mitmdump -ArgumentList @('--mode','regular@8082','-s',$addon,'-v) -RedirectStandardOutput $outLog -RedirectStandardError $errLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $p.Id | Set-Content -Encoding ASCII $pidFile; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1;

tasks.label: mitmproxy:stop
args: $ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $ws='${workspaceFolder}'; $pidFile=Join-Path $ws '.vscode\mitmproxy.pid'; if (Test-Path $pidFile) { $pid=(Get-Content $pidFile | Select-Object -First 1); if ($pid) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {} } Remove-Item $pidFile -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; } exit 0
